title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Requests
description: The system is vulnerable to denial-of-service (DoS) attacks if it lacks proper rate limiting and resource management. Attackers could flood the system with requests, overwhelming its resources and rendering it unavailable to legitimate users.
affected_component: Application Servers, Database Servers, Network Infrastructure
attack_vector: Attackers send a large volume of requests to the system, consuming its resources and causing it to crash or become unresponsive.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic and reduce load on the origin server.
Employ DDoS mitigation services to detect and block malicious traffic.
